gpt55_review_summary: Initial GPT-5.5 review found raw version comparison could reject PEP 440-equivalent wheel spellings. Fixed by using packaging.version.Version with an explicit runtime dependency and added normalized-version regression coverage; re-review approved.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: release bundle wheel validation now compares normalized wheel filename and METADATA versions
package metadata documents the normalized wheel version requirement
why: release bundles should not accept tested wheel artifacts whose filename and package metadata describe different versions
